headline: Is It Too Late To Consider eBay (EBAY) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
summary: This article examines whether eBay's share price still offers value after a strong run, or whether most of the easy gains may already be behind it, by focusing squarely on what investors are paying for today. With the stock at US$105.63 and returns of 5.6% over 7 days, 17.6% over 30 days, 21.3% year to date and 60.8% over 1 year, plus 157.5% over 3 years and 85.0% over 5 years, many investors are asking how that track record lines up with the current valuation.
